# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

**NAME:** Rohit Khanna
**OFFICE TELEPHONE:** 202-225-2631

- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives
  - State: CA  District: 17
  - File an original and 2 copies
- [ ] Officer or Employee
  - Employing Office: (blank)
  - File an original and 1 copy

**Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** [ ] Yes  [X] No

**Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report:** [X] Initial Report  [ ] Amendment
Date of Report Being Amended: (blank)

Filed stamp: [JUL] 07 2020 — LEGISLATIVE RESOURCE CENTER — 2020 JUL 17 PM 12:50 — OFFICE OF THE CLERK, U.S. HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES — MC (For Official Use Only)

A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.

Transaction grid on this page is blank except the printed "Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock" row; the asset name column reads **"Please see the attached"** (transactions listed on attached pages).
